title: Add governance workflow CLI
description: Add a CLI workflow that turns a requirement into a reviewed design and a structured AO task plan.
acceptanceCriteria: The workflow accepts a requirement JSON file.
Each design review round is persisted.
The final task-plan.json can be passed to execute-plan.
constraints: Execution tasks must use AO roles only.
ClaudeCode task-plan output must be validated before writing the final plan.
